@@ -1,13 +1,12 @@
# Wippersnapper Component Definitions # Wippersnapper Component Definitions
Welcome! This repository contains JSON definition files and images that allow components and sensors to be used with WipperSnapper, Adafruit IO's no-code IoT service. Welcome! This repository contains JSON definition files and images that allow components and sensors to be used with [WipperSnapper](https://io.adafruit.com/wippersnapper), Adafruit IO's no-code IoT service.
[Click here to submit suggestions](https://github.com/adafruit/WipperSnapper_Components/issues/new/choose) [Click here to submit suggestions](https://github.com/adafruit/WipperSnapper_Components/issues/new/choose)
## How Will It Work?
## How Does It Work?
Anyone can add a new component to WipperSnapper by writing a small amount of descriptive JSON and adding an image! Anyone can add a new component to WipperSnapper by writing a small amount of descriptive JSON and adding an image!
